title: lobelia oahuensis
intro: Lobelia oahuensis, also known as Ma'o or Hawaiian Lobelia, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been used to promote overall health and wellness, with benefits including reduced stress and anxiety, improved circulation, and enhanced immune function. Lobelia oahuensis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and relieve respiratory discomfort.
